Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Sprague for and with Robert Roddick (Petitioner).

The Court stated that some concern still remains with regard to time for which the Administrator is seeking compensation that don't appear to call on expertise and 21 hours to prepare what should have been a simple accounting. Mr. Roddick stated that the issue was with dealing with the Internal Revenue Service and the Franchise Tax Board regarding a $175,000.00 tax that was due, due to an error with the Title Company. The Petition to Close Case and to Authorize Final Disposition of Remaining Holdback Funds, etc. is taken under submission. The Court informed the Parties that there will be a reduction on the request for extraordinary fees.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Close Case And To Authorize Final Disposition Of Remaining Holdback Funds And Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Continued To Sep-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sprague for petitioner Nancy Roddick.

Mr. Sprague said that he has a response from Mr. Roddick to the examiner's notes, but that it has not yet been signed. The Court stated that an amendment to the petition would be required. Mr. Sprague asked for a continuance. The matter was continued to September 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Continued To Oct-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick for Nancy Roddick.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to October 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Roddick's Wife to have other Counsel. The Court advised Counsel that he needs to file a Substitution of Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
